summary: Live preflight shows the original representative #65010 is closed and superseded. The surviving canonical path is open PR #73365, backed by open issue #48003. #73365 is not merge-ready because relevant checks and the latest ClawSweeper review are not clean, so this result plans a narrow repair of the existing Clownfish PR branch and keeps all already-closed historical refs closed without new close actions.

actions.reason: Keep the source issue open until #73365 or its repaired replacement lands and validates the behavior.
Already closed historical source PR; credit should be preserved in the repaired #73365 path.
Already closed Telegram-specific predecessor; keep as related credit/evidence, not as a mutation target.
Closed Telegram delivery subproblem; related but not the active core canonical path.
Representative is obsolete; keep closed and carry credit forward through #73365 repair.
Closed related interrupt-race work; not a live mutation target.
Closed related Telegram delivery branch; keep as evidence and credit context only.
Repair the existing #73365 Clownfish branch, address review-bot findings and failing behavior proof, then re-run validation before any merge or closeout.
Create an executable repair artifact for #73365 so the executor can rebase, fix review findings, validate, run /review, and only then merge or block with concrete evidence.
